title: chrysanthellum indicum subsp. afroamericanum
intro: Chrysanthellum indicum subsp. afroamericanum, also known as the yellow crown, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Chrysanthellum indicum subsp. afroamericanum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
